_comments.cluster: 'devnet' for testing (free), or 'mainnet-beta' for the real launch.
_comments.rpcUrl: Leave empty to use the public RPC for the chosen cluster. For mainnet a paid RPC (Helius/QuickNode/Triton) is strongly recommended.
_comments.keypairPath: Path to the WALLET that pays and receives the supply. Use YOUR own keypair. Generate one with 'npm run keygen' or export from Phantom/Solflare.
_comments.decimals: 9 is the Solana convention. Most memecoins use 6 or 9.
_comments.supply: Total number of whole tokens to mint (NOT including decimals). 1,000,000,000 = 1 billion.
_comments.metadataUri: URL to a JSON file describing the token (name/symbol/description/image). Run 'npm run upload' to create one, or host your own.
